The '''emerald shark''' was a huge [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Shark/Legends|shark]]. Multiple emerald sharks were part of the rainbow-[[Color/Legends|colored]] school of [[Fish/Legends|fish]] that dwelt within a central column of [[Water/Legends|water]] in an [[Dubrillion Aquarium|aquarium]] located on<ref name="Dark Tide" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Dubrillion system/Legends|Dubrillion system]]</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]]<ref name="Dark Tide" /> in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'', during which emerald [[Shark/Legends|sharks]] were present in the [[Dubrillion Aquarium]], to [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Emerald sharks were mentioned in [[Michael A. Stackpole]]'s [[2000]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'', the second installment of the [[Dark Tide duology|''Dark Tide Duology'']] and third volume overall in the ''[[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order]]'' series.<ref name="Dark Tide" />
